case_title: PMGI, LLC VS. LERANDIE B BANKS et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PMGI, LLC BANKS, LERANDIE B AKA MRS. BOB BANKS BANKS, BOB

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PMGI, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKS, LERANDIE B AKA MRS. BOB BANKS BANKS, BOB $2,166.97 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $649.45 INTEREST, $493.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,795.22, DEFENDANTS ARE TO PAY $1886 ON OR BEFORE 9/10/03 AS FULL SETTLEMENT OF THE CASE. IF DEFAULTS FULL JUDGMENT BALANCE IS DUE, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 225 SET FOR OCT-07-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. SEP-03-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-03-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-01-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
